parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_win_loss (opportunity_title, solicitation_number, agency, naics_code, set_aside, contract_value, decision_outcome, decision_date, winner, winning_price, our_price, debrief_summary, strengths, weaknesses, lessons_learned, competitor_names, teaming_partners, gda_unit, capture_manager, proposal_lead, pwin_at_submission) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, COALESCE(NULLIF($8,'')::DATE, CURRENT_DATE), $9, $10, $11, $12, $13::text[]::text[], $14::text[]::text[], $15::text[]::text[], $16::text[]::text[], $17::text[]::text[], $18, $19, $20, $21) RETURNING id, opportunity_title, decision_outcome

options.queryParameters: ={{ JSON.stringify([$json.opportunity_title||'', $json.solicitation_number||'', $json.agency||'', $json.naics_code||'', $json.set_aside||'', parseFloat($json.contract_value)||0, $json.decision_outcome||'NO_BID', $json.decision_date||'', $json.winner||'', parseFloat($json.winning_price)||0, parseFloat($json.our_price)||0, $json.debrief_summary||'', JSON.stringify($json.strengths||[]), JSON.stringify($json.weaknesses||[]), JSON.stringify($json.lessons_learned||[]), JSON.stringify($json.competitor_names||[]), JSON.stringify($json.teaming_partners||[]), $json.gda_unit||'EIS', $json.capture_manager||'', $json.proposal_lead||'', parseInt($json.pwin_at_submission)||0]) }}

parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_win_loss (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, opportunity_title TEXT NOT NULL, solicitation_number TEXT, agency TEXT, naics_code TEXT, set_aside TEXT, contract_value NUMERIC, decision_outcome TEXT, decision_date DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE, winner TEXT, winning_price NUMERIC, our_price NUMERIC, debrief_summary TEXT, strengths TEXT[], weaknesses TEXT[], lessons_learned TEXT[], evaluation_factors JSONB, competitor_names TEXT[], teaming_partners TEXT[], gda_unit TEXT, capture_manager TEXT, proposal_lead TEXT, pwin_at_submission INTEGER, tags TEXT[], created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());
SELECT *, CASE WHEN decision_outcome = 'WIN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_win FROM gda_win_loss ORDER BY decision_date DESC LIMIT 100

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', action: 'list', records: $input.all().map(function(i) { var r = i.json; return Object.assign({}, r, { contract_value: parseFloat(r.contract_value) || 0, winning_price: parseFloat(r.winning_price) || 0, our_price: parseFloat(r.our_price) || 0, pwin_at_submission: parseInt(r.pwin_at_submission) || 0 }); }), count: $input.all().length, stats: { total: $input.all().length, wins: $input.all().filter(function(i) { return i.json.decision_outcome === 'WIN'; }).length, losses: $input.all().filter(function(i) { return i.json.decision_outcome === 'LOSS'; }).length, no_bids: $input.all().filter(function(i) { return i.json.decision_outcome === 'NO_BID'; }).length, win_rate: $input.all().length > 0 ? Math.round($input.all().filter(function(i) { return i.json.decision_outcome === 'WIN'; }).length / Math.max(1, $input.all().filter(function(i) { return i.json.decision_outcome === 'WIN' || i.json.decision_outcome === 'LOSS'; }).length) * 100) : 0 } }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM gda_win_loss ORDER BY decision_date DESC LIMIT 50

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }], system: 'You are a Shipley-trained capture management analyst performing win/loss analysis for a defense contractor. Identify actionable patterns. Return only valid JSON.' }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid action. Use: record, list, analyze' }) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  action: 'log',
  event_type: $('Webhook').first().json.body.outcome === 'Won' ? 'win' : 'loss',
  entity_type: 'opportunity',
  entity_id: $('Webhook').first().json.body.opp_id || null,
  predicted_value: $('Webhook').first().json.body.pwin_at_submission || null,
  actual_value: $('Webhook').first().json.body.outcome === 'Won' ? 1 : 0,
  signal: $('Webhook').first().json.body.outcome,
  context: {
    agency: $('Webhook').first().json.body.agency || '',
    naics: $('Webhook').first().json.body.naics_code || '',
    set_aside: $('Webhook').first().json.body.set_aside || '',
    contract_value: $('Webhook').first().json.body.contract_value || null,
    loss_reason: $('Webhook').first().json.body.loss_reason || null
  },
  source: 'win-loss-db'
}) }}
